creator: florian.millet@laposte.net
text:
Created attachment 241815
patch for stable/13

Here is a patch to fix compilation on stable/13 with the option BHYVE_SNAPSHOT enabled.
From what I've seen this error came with commit 	6efb053bea5f94e2c29adafcaf5b9c56d99fa220

Tested with a tree at revision 06e36c8c7717338558aa807db63c80f245bf533b that it fixes compilation of world.

This error is also present on CURRENT.
